name: Subtitle Maker
description: Upload a video/audio file, automatically generate SRT/VTT subtitles, and one-click burn them back into the video. Reuses the ASR engine from highlight-cutter.

description_i18n.zh: 上传一段视频/音频，自动生成 SRT/VTT 字幕，可一键烧录回视频。复用 highlight-cutter 的 ASR 引擎。
description_i18n.en: Upload a video/audio file, automatically generate SRT/VTT subtitles, and one-click burn them back into the video. Reuses the ASR engine from highlight-cutter.

author: OpenAkita
